positive: A geometric forest landscape with stylized fauna and flora. The central subject is a majestic, abstract fox silhouette leaping through stylized, bioluminescent trees and crystalline foliage. The composition is highly symmetrical and centered, creating a sense of depth and dynamic movement. The art style should be clean, modern neo-folk tattoo design combined with graphic minimalism, rendered with strong, contrasting linework and solid blocks of color (indigo, emerald green, gold leaf accents). Use flat color fills, high contrast, and thick outlines. Ensure the design is scalable and works well as a repeat or singular apparel graphic. Aspect ratio 1:1.
negative: blur, noisy, grainy, lowres, watermark, signature, logo, text, bad anatomy, extra limbs, deformed, poor composition, bokeh, photorealism, gradients (too smooth), muted colors
